title: Factory Intent
description: A high-level spec or intent that a planner decomposes into a feature and dev/qa packet pairs.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Must match the filename (without .json).

title.description: Human-readable summary of the requested outcome.

spec.description: High-level problem statement or desired outcome for the planner to decompose.

constraints.description: Optional constraints or requirements the planner must honor.

status.description: Intent lifecycle status. Planning produces a feature; execution remains on the feature and packets.

feature_id.description: Linked feature artifact generated from this intent.

planned_at.description: When planning completed and the linked feature/packets were created.
